landingPage.name: Youssef Abouyahia
landingPage.resumeText:
Cybersecurity Engineer passionate about offensive security and regularly competing in CTFs.
 
 I love self-hosting, managing my own infrastructure, and building custom n8n workflows to automate and optimize my daily life. Recently, I've become interested in IoT security to learn how to secure the very devices I build. My next challenge is to find a role where I can help protect organizations and society while doing what I love.

forensique.title: Forensics
forensique.contentText: Advanced skills in digital forensics: data acquisition, evidence analysis, and development of analysis tools.

reverse.title: Reverse Engineering
reverse.contentText: Strong skills in static/dynamic binary analysis and malware deobfuscation.

devsecops.title: DevSecOps
devsecops.contentText: Deployment and hosting of tools and solutions while taking into account IT security and regulatory compliance. Proficient in CI/CD and network security.

domotique.title: Home Automation
domotique.contentText: Local hosting of home automation solutions. Installation, creation, and connection of home automation devices to automate repetitive daily tasks.

developpement.title: Development
developpement.contentText: Expertise in Java, Python, C/C++, Javascript, Bash, Docker, and more. Advanced use of Github for version management and collaboration on personal and professional projects.

pentesting.title: Offensive Security
pentesting.contentText: Skills in vulnerability assessment, exploitation, and security report writing. Experience with penetration testing methodologies and tools (Nmap, Metasploit, Hydra, Burp Suite...

grc.title: GRC
grc.contentText: Expertise in risk assessment, compliance management, audit support, and implementation of security frameworks. Frameworks include GDPR, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, DORA, and NIS2.

aboutMePage.title: WHOAMI?
aboutMePage.paragraph_one: Cybersecurity Engineer with 3 years of experience, recently graduated with a Master's in Cybersecurity and Crisis Leadership from ESILV. I specialize in securing cloud and on-premise infrastructures, penetration testing, and governance, risk, and compliance (GRC).
aboutMePage.paragraph_two: My approach: break to understand, understand to secure better. I enjoy developing attack scenarios, testing evasion techniques, and identifying vulnerabilities before others exploit them. I navigate both code and infrastructure as well as compliance audits (ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR, DORA) and risk analysis (EBIOS RM).
aboutMePage.paragraph_three: Certified Professional Cloud Security Engineer (Google) and passionate about IoT and hardware hacking, I regularly participate in CTFs to sharpen my skills and stay current with the latest exploitation techniques. I am seeking a full-time position starting October 2026 to contribute to securing critical and high-stakes environments.
